chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Special Sales Tax Reference Application No.127 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES Hearing of case [Priority] 1. For orders on office objection / reply 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of CMA No.1138 of 2018 [Stay Application] 23.04.2025 Mr. Shamshad Ahmed, Advocate for Respondent ************ None present on behalf of the Applicant nor any intimation received. Record reflects that since last three dates of hearing starting from 2019, no one has turned up on behalf of the Applicant. In view of such position, this Reference Application is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. ACTING CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Qurban/PA*
